Counselor '''Harthan''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] of the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] who once owned [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].

==Biography==
Around [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]] he was called in to negotiate an end to the [[Troob]]-[[Hobor]] hostilities on [[Tahlboor]]. The effort was nearly ruined due to his [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] addiction, avoidance of [[Droid/Legends|droids]], and the efforts of his son, [[Jake Harthan|Jake]], to cause a genocidal war so that the Tion Hegemony could take possession of the [[sky cannon]]. With the help of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], he discovered his son's treachery; yet the two [[Species/Legends|species]] discovered peace through [[Mount Yeroc]] requesting that Harthan ask the Hegemony to leave them to their own devices.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]'' {{1st}}
